task_completion.description: Navigate to the settings for the 'Northeast Presence' (NEASTPRS) campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the campaign ID 'NEASTPRS' or name 'Northeast Presence' in the page header, title, or active selection menu of the campaign management interface.

task_completion.description: Enable the Area Code Caller ID (AC-CID) feature for the campaign
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkbox, toggle, or dropdown indicating 'AC-CID', 'Area Code Caller ID', or 'Local Presence' is set to 'Y', 'Yes', 'Active', 'Enabled', or checked within the campaign settings.

task_completion.description: Configure AC-CID mappings for New York (212) and Boston (617)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table, list, or input fields in the AC-CID section showing area code '212' mapped to Caller ID '2125559901' and area code '617' mapped to Caller ID '6175559902'.

task_completion.description: Configure AC-CID mappings for Philadelphia (215) and Hartford (860)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table, list, or input fields in the AC-CID section showing area code '215' mapped to Caller ID '2155559903' and area code '860' mapped to Caller ID '8605559904'.

task_completion.description: Configure AC-CID mappings for Trenton (609) and Bridgeport (203)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table, list, or input fields in the AC-CID section showing area code '609' mapped to Caller ID '6095559905' and area code '203' mapped to Caller ID '2035559906'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show a web browser or application GUI being interacted with, rather than a terminal window executing SQL queries or API commands.

integrity.description: The mappings were entered into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the mappings are displayed within the campaign management interface's specific AC-CID configuration section, not just typed into a generic text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure no terminal windows are visible running Python, bash, or other scripts to automate the database injection.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Campaign ID: NEASTPRS. Expected AC-CID mappings: 212 -> 2125559901, 617 -> 6175559902, 215 -> 2155559903, 860 -> 8605559904, 609 -> 6095559905, 203 -> 2035559906. Exactly 6 mappings should be configured in the AC-CID section.
